title: NeoFertility Medical Training Cohort
description:
The NeoFertility Medical Training Cohort is an 11-week live program providing a structured diagnostic and treatment framework for infertility and recurrent miscarriage using Restorative Reproductive Medicine.

Designed for Family Medicine, OB/GYN, and women's health clinicians, this cohort combines on-demand coursework with live mentorship from Dr. Phil Boyle, founder of NeoFertility and a pioneer in RRM.

The program covers:

• The foundations of Restorative Reproductive Medicine

• Diagnostic and treatment protocols for hormonal and cycle-related conditions

• The psychology of conception and patient relationships

• Chart Neo app integration for data-driven patient care

• Case studies and outcome-based implementation
shortDescription: 11-week live training in Restorative Reproductive Medicine for clinicians treating infertility and recurrent miscarriage. Led by Dr. Phil Boyle. 20+ CME credits.
imageAlt: NeoFertility Medical Training Cohort branded graphic: April 20 – July 2, 2026, 20+ CME, live sessions, ChartNeo access, with the neo circle logo on a blue gradient background
whatsIncluded: 10-lesson course with Dr. Phil Boyle (15 CME credits)
Monthly live case studies with Dr. Phil Boyle & Dr. Monica Minjeur (CME eligible)
One additional staff member access for your clinic

instructors.name: Dr. Phil Boyle
instructors.bio: Dr. Phil Boyle is the founder of NeoFertility and a pioneer in Restorative Reproductive Medicine. His published clinical data demonstrates a 41% live birth rate, and his NeoFertility protocol has helped hundreds of clinicians worldwide achieve measurable patient outcomes for infertility and recurrent miscarriage.
